$comment: Per-project causal/dependency graph. nodes=modules/files, edges=[cause,effect] (cause is imported-by effect), invariants=health rules the L4 verifier checks before declaring done. Regenerate the skeleton with tools/graphizer.mjs; add invariants BY HAND.

invariants.$example_node: Plain-English health rule, e.g. 'API latency < 200ms' or 'domain layer imports no framework'.

freeze_boundary: $comment: globs the driver may edit; everything else is off-limits without explicit user request
